Successor Trustees Petition For Allowance Of Trustees And Attorneys Compensation; And For Bond Fee Pursuant To Probate Code 15688
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee To Fill Vacancy
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Mannion stated that her office is appointed for another one third owner of the property, that Catherine's estate is in San Mateo, that someone was appointed for Edward and that the last piece of the puzzle is here. Ms. Mannion also stated that she is here today for authority to sell the property and distribute to the Heirs, that everybody has gotten notice, that the property is dilapidated, that the sale is just for the land and that the house is not salvageable. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee to Fill Vacancy is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee To Fill Vacancy
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Continued To Jul-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
